summary: Correlated a later FireFlow minute at 2026-03-26 19:40 EDT. Evidence keeps this branch Apache/AFF/FireFlow to ms-configuration centered; ActiveMQ should not be promoted earlier because broker log evidence is absent for the selected minute and only later monitor-topic KahaDB mtimes appear around 19:45.
follow_up_recommendations: If a future slice shows same-minute broker evidence, capture destination names and compare them against known FireFlow or approval worker classes before changing the dependency order.
Consider adding a playbook branch for ms-configuration swagger refresh and downstream 502 AutoDiscovery failures, since that signal was concrete in this minute.
